creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
stas        2006-11-22 22:18:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/etherboot        Makefile distinfo 
    net/etherboot/files  patch-af 
  Added files:
    net/etherboot/files  patch-c99 
  Removed files:
    net/etherboot/files  patch-ab 
  Log:
  - Update to 5.2.6
  
  ChangeLog:
  - Support for FILO
  - Support for USB disks
  - btext console
  - Fixes for eepro100, rtl8139, sis900, tlan, tulip and via-rhine drivers
  - Added drivers for mtd80x and Davicom based cards
  
  PR:             ports/101721
  Submitted by:   me (stas)
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (3,5 months)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.29      +7 -5      ports/net/etherboot/Makefile
